description: The overlap-107 bridge is directionally favorable overall but mixed at the family level; GLCM is not significant. The current manuscript now discloses that caveat explicitly.
recommended_action: No further action needed unless reviewers request per-family overlap CIs in the main text.

description: The paired benchmark compares 5 specialist contours with 3 packaged AI contours, so replicate counts are asymmetric. The manuscript now frames the benchmark through effect magnitude, direction, and sensitivity analyses rather than replicate-matched variance theory.
recommended_action: No further action needed; the limitation is already disclosed in Methods and Discussion.

description: The repository does not preserve enough upstream metadata to regenerate the exact 3 benchmark AI contours from TCIA source alone. The manuscript now limits external reproduction claims to the packaged benchmark inputs.
recommended_action: No further action needed unless the benchmark package itself changes.
